节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the accounts of the enterprise devices.
注释信息: @namespace accountManager
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@since 10

节点.功能描述: Disallow the user of device add local account. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_SET_ACCOUNT_POLICY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { boolean } disallow - true if the user is not allowed to add local account.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of disallowAddLocalAccount.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@systemapi
@StageModelOnly
@since 10

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
true if the user is not allowed to add local account.
the callback of disallowAddLocalAccount.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.

节点.功能描述: Disallows the user to add an OS account. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_SET_ACCOUNT_POLICY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { number } userId - indicates the user ID. It cannot be the ID of a user that does not exist.
@param { boolean } disallow - true if the specific user is not allowed to add an OS account.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@systemapi
@stagemodelonly
@since 11

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
indicates the user ID. It cannot be the ID of a user that does not exist.
true if the specific user is not allowed to add an OS account.

节点.功能描述: Queries whether the user is disallowed to add an OS account. This function can be called by a super administrator. If the admin is not empty, it must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_SET_ACCOUNT_POLICY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { number } userId - indicates the user ID. It cannot be the ID of a user that does not exist.
@returns { boolean } true if the specific user is not allowed to add an OS account.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@systemapi
@stagemodelonly
@since 11

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
indicates the user ID. It cannot be the ID of a user that does not exist.

节点.return_description: true if the specific user is not allowed to add an OS account.

节点.功能描述: Adds an OS account using the name and account type. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_SET_ACCOUNT_POLICY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { string } name - the OS account name. It cannot be empty.
@param { osAccount.OsAccountType } type - the OS account type. It can only be one of specified types.
@returns { osAccount.OsAccountInfo } information about the OS account added.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9201003 - Failed to add an OS account.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@systemapi
@stagemodelonly
@since 11

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
the OS account name. It cannot be empty.
the OS account type. It can only be one of specified types.

节点.return_description: information about the OS account added.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.

节点.功能描述: Disallows the account or all accounts to add an OS account. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.

@param { boolean } disallow - true if the specific account or all accounts are not allowed to add an OS account.
@param { number } [accountId] - indicates the account ID. It cannot be the ID of an account that does not exist.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
